meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Learn how to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to ship production-ready SaaS features faster than ever before.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start shipping. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform documentation into an autonomous development engine. This workflow allows you to define business logic, generate architectural patterns, and execute production-ready code directly, bypassing the cycle of passive learning for active, revenue-generating product development.
content.intro:
The screen glows with a flickering cursor, a silent witness to hours wasted watching 'build a clone' videos that never lead to a viable SaaS. You’ve mastered the art of watching others code, but your own repository remains a graveyard of half-finished commits. This is the silent killer of ambition: tutorial hell.

But the paradigm has shifted. We are entering the era of the AI-augmented founder. By leveraging Claude Code as your lead engineer and Antigravity as your architectural blueprint, you stop being a student and start being a technical architect. It is time to stop watching and start executing.

steps.title: Define the Business Primitive
steps.description: Before writing code, define the core value proposition. Use Antigravity to map your MVP features to data structures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Define the minimum viable data schema for a subscription-based SaaS handling user authentication and Stripe payment integration. Focus on scalability and lean architecture.

steps.title: Configure the Claude Code Environment
steps.description: Initialize your project with Claude Code to ensure the AI understands your local project context and coding standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a .claudeignore and a project-specific system prompt that enforces clean code, modular architecture, and TDD practices.

steps.title: Architecting the Database Layer
steps.description: Map your schema to your ORM. This is where most founders fail; don't over-engineer early.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create Prisma schema definitions for a multi-tenant SaaS. Ensure all tables are indexed for performance and include RLS policies for security.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema and apply migrations'

steps.title: Implementing Core Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the actual service layer functions, focusing on pure business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the service layer for processing user subscriptions. Ensure idempotency and robust error handling for Stripe webhook events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement subscription service with error handling'

steps.title: Automated Testing and Validation
steps.description: Ensure your code works before you deploy. Never manually test what an AI can verify.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create unit tests for the subscription service using Vitest. Focus on edge cases and failure modes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate and run unit tests for subscription service'

pro_tips: Always use a custom system prompt in Claude Code to enforce your specific coding style—it prevents the AI from defaulting to generic, bloated boilerplate.
Treat your Antigravity prompts like API documentation; the more structured your input, the more deterministic your output.
Never accept the first iteration from Claude Code; always ask it to 'refactor for readability' to maintain high-quality codebases.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation as you build, not after; it acts as a real-time technical writer for your future self.
Keep your context window clean by modularizing your files; if the AI struggles, you've likely over-complicated the file structure.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is configured, take the core business logic you built and deploy it to a staging environment using Vercel or Railway to validate your MVP in the wild.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the architecture, and the workflow. The only variable remaining is your commitment to shipping. Stop waiting for the perfect tutorial and start building the product that changes your trajectory. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
